exercises.title: SELECT All
exercises.description: Select all records from the Customers table.
exercises.solutionCode:
-- The hint provides the solution:
-- SELECT * FROM Customers;

exercises.title: SELECT Columns
exercises.description: Select only CustomerName and Country from Customers.
exercises.solutionCode:
-- The hint provides the solution:
-- SELECT CustomerName, Country FROM Customers;

exercises.title: WHERE Clause
exercises.solutionCode:
-- The hint provides the solution:
-- SELECT * FROM Customers WHERE Country = 'Mexico';

exercises.title: ORDER BY
exercises.description: Select all customers ordered by CustomerName alphabetically.
exercises.hint: SELECT * FROM Customers ORDER BY CustomerName;
exercises.solutionCode:
-- The hint provides the solution:
-- SELECT * FROM Customers ORDER BY CustomerName;

exercises.title: COUNT
exercises.description: Count the total number of customers.
exercises.solutionCode:
-- The hint provides the solution:
-- SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers;

exercises.title: DISTINCT
exercises.solutionCode:
-- The hint provides the solution:
-- SELECT DISTINCT Country FROM Customers;

exercises.title: LIKE Pattern
exercises.description: Find customers whose name starts with 'A'.
exercises.hint: SELECT * FROM Customers WHERE CustomerName LIKE 'A%';
exercises.solutionCode:
-- The hint provides the solution:
-- SELECT * FROM Customers WHERE CustomerName LIKE 'A%';

exercises.title: INSERT
exercises.solutionCode:
-- The hint provides the solution:
-- INSERT INTO Customers VALUES (6,'CareerPath Corp','Admin','India');

exercises.title: UPDATE
exercises.description: Update the country of CustomerID 1 to 'USA'.
exercises.hint: UPDATE Customers SET Country = 'USA' WHERE CustomerID = 1;
exercises.solutionCode:
-- The hint provides the solution:
-- UPDATE Customers SET Country = 'USA' WHERE CustomerID = 1;

exercises.title: DELETE
exercises.solutionCode:
-- The hint provides the solution:
